meaning: n.[希神]忒勒马科斯(Odysseus 和Penelope之子)
examples: The subject is Telemachus being knighted by Minerva in some gardens.
Telemachus, in Homer's story of the Odyssey, tipped his vehicle vertically against a wall, while others removed their wheels in the evening (Gordon, 1978) to prevent warping.
Batsman Loots Bosman, veterans Neil McKenzie and Roger Telemachus and spinner Thandi Tshabalala are all in the Twenty20 squad for the match in Johannesburg.
Captain Nasser Hussain also fell cheaply, hooking Roger Telemachus straight to Willoughby in the deep for just nine, to leave the tourists in some trouble at 14 for two.
